front:
SKILL 1 вҖ” WASHING HANDS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Arms angled DOWNWARD вҖ” hands LOWER than elbows when wetting & rinsing
вӯҗ Scrub 20+ seconds (palms, between fingers, backs, under nails)
вӯҗ Use 2nd paper towel to turn OFF faucet вҖ” clean hands never touch it
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Turn faucet ON with bare hand. Water running.
2. Arms DOWNWARD вҖ” hands LOWER than elbows. Wet hands AND wrists fully.
3. Apply soap. Form visible lather.
4. вӯҗ Scrub AT LEAST 20 SECONDS: palms together, between fingers, backs of hands, scratch nails on opposite palm.
5. Scratch nails of each hand on the opposite palm.
6. вӯҗ Rinse hands DOWNWARD (hands lower than elbows) вҖ” dirty water flows off fingertips, away from body.
7. вӯҗ Dry with paper towel (palms, backs, between fingers, wrists). Hold used towel вҖ” do NOT touch wastebasket yet.
8. Use a SECOND paper towel to grip faucet and turn water OFF.
9. Drop BOTH paper towels into wastebasket. Done.

front:
SKILL 2 вҖ” REMOVING (DOFFING) GLOVES
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Pinch OUTSIDE of palm of first glove вҖ” only touch dirty outer surface
вӯҗ Slide 2 bare fingers UNDER cuff of second glove вҖ” bare skin never touches outside
вӯҗ Peel second glove inside-out over first glove forming a pouch
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. вӯҗ Dominant hand pinches OUTSIDE palm of other glove. Pull it off вҖ” touching only dirty outer surface.
2. вӯҗ Hold removed glove in palm of still-gloved hand (make a fist around it). With bare hand, slide 2 fingers (index + middle) UNDER cuff of remaining glove at wrist.
3. вӯҗ Push fingers down and outward вҖ” peel glove INSIDE OUT off hand. It wraps around first glove like a pouch.
4. End result: one inside-out bundle, bare skin only touched clean inner surfaces.
5. Drop bundle into trash. Nothing touches sides of can.
6. Immediately wash hands.

front:
SKILL 3 вҖ” ABDOMINAL THRUST (HEIMLICH вҖ” CONSCIOUS)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Fist: thumb-side against belly, ABOVE navel, BELOW breastbone
вӯҗ Wrap other hand around fist вҖ” pull INWARD and UP (J-shape motion)
вӯҗ Repeat until object pops out OR person loses consciousness
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Approach. Ask loudly: "ARE YOU CHOKING? CAN YOU BREATHE?"
2. If no verbal response вҖ” proceed immediately.
3. Move BEHIND person. Arms wrap under armpits around waist.
4. вӯҗ Make a FIST. Place flat thumb-side on belly: ABOVE navel, BELOW breastbone (center bullseye zone).
5. вӯҗ Other hand WRAPS AROUND fist. Pull TOWARD you and UP вҖ” sharp J-shape motion. Person should jolt.
6. Watch mouth. If nothing exits вҖ” RESET and repeat.
7. Continue until object exits OR person collapses (then call for help/CPR).
8. Sit person down. Report incident. Document.

front:
SKILL 4 вҖ” HANDLING SOILED EQUIPMENT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Hold soiled equipment OUT AND AWAY from body вҖ” never touching clothes
вӯҗ Clean with COLD WATER first (hot can set biological material)
вӯҗ Wash hands BEFORE and AFTER the skill
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash and dry hands вҖ” full technique.
2. Don gloves вҖ” both hands snug at wrist.
3. вӯҗ Pick up soiled equipment (bedpan, urinal, etc.). Hold OUT AND AWAY from body вҖ” arms extended, not touching scrubs.
4. Carry to utility sink. Clean with COLD WATER first, then disinfectant. Scrub all surfaces.
5. Carry clean equipment to correct labeled storage. Place in designated spot.
6. Peel off gloves using doffing technique. Trash.
7. Wash and dry hands again вҖ” full technique.

front:
SKILL 5 вҖ” HANDLING SOILED WASTE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, waste container, fresh bag liner
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Grab ONLY OUTSIDE surface of waste bag вҖ” never reach inside
вӯҗ Tie bag closed by twisting top and double-knotting (like a balloon)
вӯҗ Replace bag liner before leaving
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash hands вҖ” full technique.
2. Don gloves.
3. Drop soiled items one-by-one directly into waste container.
4. Disinfect any contaminated surfaces; let sit appropriate contact time before wiping.
5. Peel off gloves using doffing technique. Drop into waste container.
6. вӯҗ Grab ONLY OUTSIDE of waste bag. Pinch gathered top вҖ” tie CLOSED (twist + double-knot like a balloon).
7. Pull fresh liner from storage. Snap into empty container.
8. Wash and dry hands вҖ” full technique.
9. Carry tied bag to designated disposal area.

front:
SKILL 6 вҖ” HANDLING SOILED BED LINENS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, linen bag
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ ROLL linen away from you вҖ” soiled surface folds INSIDE (like a sleeping bag)
вӯҗ Drop rolled bundle directly into linen bag вҖ” no floor contact
вӯҗ Grab ONLY EXTERIOR of linen bag to close and tie
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash hands вҖ” full technique.
2. Don gloves.
3. вӯҗ Grip edge of soiled linen and ROLL it вҖ” soiled surface INSIDE, rolling away from you. Keep away from clothing.
4. Carry rolled bundle and drop directly into linen bag. No floor contact.
5. Peel off gloves. Drop in waste container.
6. вӯҗ Grab ONLY EXTERIOR of linen bag. Close and TIE SHUT (pinch and knot). Replace liner inside bag holder.
7. Wash and dry hands вҖ” full technique.
8. Carry tied bag to laundry area.

front:
SKILL 7 вҖ” MOVING RESIDENT UP IN BED
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: None
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Staggered stance: feet 12 inches apart, front foot toward head of bed
вӯҗ One arm under SHOULDERS, one under HIPS
вӯҗ Shift weight from BACK to FRONT foot on "three" (leg momentum, not arm strength)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands.
3. Face-to-face. Explain procedure slowly.
4. Privacy (curtain/door).
5. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. FLATTEN bed completely (head + knee sections). Work height appropriate.
6. Remove pillow. Fan-fold linens to foot of bed (resident covered for privacy).
7. Ask resident to BEND KNEES вҖ” feet flat on mattress, knees up.
8. вӯҗ Stand at SIDE of bed. Feet 12 INCHES APART in staggered stance вҖ” front foot pointing toward head of bed. Back straight. Bend at hips and knees (squat, not hunch).
9. вӯҗ Slide one arm under SHOULDERS, other arm under HIPS.
10. вӯҗ Count aloud "1, 2, 3" вҖ” tell resident to push feet into mattress and lift hips. On THREE: shift weight BACK FOOT to FRONT FOOT вҖ” use leg momentum to move resident up. No arm lifting.
11. Replace pillow. Check alignment вҖ” resident centered.
12. Lower bed to LOWEST position. Remove privacy. Side rails per order.
13. Call light within reach.
14. Wash hands.
15. Report changes to nurse. Document.

front:
SKILL 8 вҖ” MOVING RESIDENT UP IN BED вҖ” TWO-PERSON ASSIST
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Lift sheet, coworker
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ One person on EACH SIDE of bed, facing each other
вӯҗ Both grip rolled lift sheet: palms DOWN, one hand at SHOULDER, one at HIP level
вӯҗ Both count together and shift weight simultaneously on "three"
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly.
3. Privacy.
4. вӯҗ CALL COWORKER вҖ” one person on each SIDE of bed, facing each other.
5. Lock wheels. Raise to comfortable working HEIGHT (waist level). Flatten head + knee sections.
6. Remove pillow. Fan-fold linens to foot (resident covered).
7. Confirm or place LIFT SHEET under resident's shoulders and hips.
8. Both of you roll long sides of lift sheet INWARD toward resident вҖ” snug against body.
9. вӯҗ Both reach across: grasp rolled edge with BOTH HANDS palms FACING DOWN. One hand at SHOULDER level, one at HIP level.
10. Ask resident to bend knees and feet flat if able.
11. вӯҗ Both in staggered stance (feet 12 inches apart, front toward head of bed). Back straight, bend at hips/knees.
12. Count aloud together: "1, 2, 3" вҖ” BOTH shift weight front simultaneously, LIFTING lift sheet. Resident glides up on sheet.
13. Replace pillow. Check alignment.
14. Lower bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order.
15. Call light within reach.
16. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 9 вҖ” TURNING RESIDENT вҖ” AWAY & TOWARDS YOU
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Pillows
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Turning AWAY: one hand under SHOULDER, one under HIP вҖ” roll like a log away from you
вӯҗ Turning TOWARD: place hands on FAR SHOULDER and FAR HIP вҖ” roll like a log toward you
вӯҗ Feet 12 inches apart, knees slightly bent throughout
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise BOTH side rails. Raise bed to working height. Lower head section FLAT.
4. Fan-fold linens to foot (keeping resident covered for privacy).
5. Stand at side. Feet 12 INCHES APART, knees SLIGHTLY BENT.

вҖ” TURNING AWAY FROM YOU вҖ”
1. Cross resident's nearest arm OVER CHEST. Cross nearest leg OVER far leg (foot rests on bed).
2. вӯҗ Slide one hand under NEAREST SHOULDER, other under NEAREST HIP. Back straight, bend at hips/knees. Roll resident AWAY вҖ” like rolling a log away from you.

вҖ” TURNING TOWARD YOU вҖ”
1. Go to FAR side of bed. Cross FAR ARM over CHEST. Move near arm out of the way. Cross FAR LEG over near leg.
2. вӯҗ Place one hand on FAR SHOULDER, other on FAR HIP. Back straight, bend at hips/knees. Roll resident TOWARD YOU вҖ” controlled log roll.

вҖ” ENDING STEPS вҖ”
1. Return resident to BACK (supine). Straighten clothing. Smooth linens. Check tubes.
2. Lower bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
3. Call light within reach.
4. Wash hands. Report changes. Document.

front:
SKILL 10 вҖ” TURNING RESIDENT USING A TURN SHEET
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Pillows, turn sheet, coworker
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Move resident to OPPOSITE side first вҖ” gives room to roll into
вӯҗ Cross arms over chest + cross away-leg over near leg before rolling
вӯҗ Both grip rolled sheet at SHOULDER and HIP level вҖ” flip like a large fish with a net
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain slowly. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise BOTH side rails. Raise bed to working height. Flatten head section.
4. Fan-fold top linens. Place pillow at HEAD of bed.
5. вӯҗ Gently shift resident to OPPOSITE SIDE of bed from turning direction (creates room to roll).
6. вӯҗ Cross resident's arms over CHEST. Cross away-leg over near leg.
7. Roll edges of TURN SHEET inward on the side NOT being turned toward.
8. Both you and coworker grip rolled sheet вҖ” one at SHOULDER, one at HIP.
9. Alert resident and coworker: "Turning on three."
10. вӯҗ On THREE вҖ” both backs straight, bending at hips/knees вҖ” use sheet as lever to ROLL resident to their side. Controlled, smooth, one direction.
11. Pillow under HEAD AND NECK (ear to shoulder).
12. Check spine alignment from foot of bed вҖ” straight line? Comfortable?
13. Straighten clothing, linens, recheck tubes.
14. Lower bed to LOWEST. Adjust siderails. Call light within reach.
15. Wash hands. Report. Document.
